top_signals.title: Why one of the world's 'most developed markets' isn't getting developed market status, according to MSCI
top_signals.summary: MSCI CEO Henry Fernandez said South Korea's stock market still falls short of developed market standards.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. giving topped $600 billion for the first time last year. Megadonors and bequests are to thank
top_signals.summary: The stock market rally turbocharged charitable giving in 2025, but primarily from wealthy donors.

top_signals.title: Japan unveils multiyear framework as part of budget reform
top_signals.summary: The mechanism is expected to start next fiscal year and will be used to fund measures including investments in economic security and crisis preparedness.
